hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"SPEC CHECK: Before starting this task, check the specs/ folder. If a relevant spec exists, confirm it covers the change. If no spec exists, ask the user: should I write a spec first? Skip only for pure bug fixes or CSS-only tweaks."}}'

printf '{"systemMessage":"README check: if anything changed this session (features, structure, flow, behaviour, config), update README.md now. If no update is needed, tell the user why in one line."}'

printf '{"systemMessage":"i18n check: if any user-facing strings were added or changed - (1) both T.en and T.fr keys must exist in data.js, (2) always use t(key) in JS never hardcode display strings, (3) dynamic content must use S.lang with fallback to .en. Fix any violations before finishing."}'

printf '{"systemMessage":"Code language check: all new or modified code must be written in English — variable names, function names, comments, parameter names, object keys, and any identifiers. Non-English identifiers or comments are not allowed. If any violations exist in code written this session, fix them before finishing."}'

printf '{"systemMessage":"Read-aloud coverage check: for every new user-facing text element added this session — (1) dynamically rendered questions, instructions, scenarios, and option/answer buttons must have a speak() auto-read call AND/OR a 🔊 item-read-btn/sort-read-btn span (tap-to-read); (2) draggable game cards must include the read span with stopPropagation on touchstart/click; (3) new static HTML text areas (headings, description boxes) should have an item-read-btn button nearby or be covered by the global click listener; (4) speakOnce() must be used for explicit tap-to-read buttons (bypasses S.tts), speak() for auto-reads (respects S.tts); (5) CRITICAL — every read button click handler must call e.stopPropagation() to prevent triggering the parent button onclick; the global click listener already skips .item-read-btn and .sort-read-btn targets — never remove these guards. If any violation exists, fix it before finishing."}'
